description: At Spring Financial, I owned the end-to-end Bloom User Support feature, from scoping and flow design to Figma, app UI, backend integration, automations, documentation, and demo delivery. I shipped production web and app updates, as well as built a WordPress script injection proof of concept with CI-based deployment.

Over 8 months at PayByPhone, I expanded and maintained Android UI automation coverage using Espresso, UiAutomator, and Jetpack Compose to keep core app flows reliable. I also maintained Kotlin-based utility apps that supported team workflows.

During my 8-month term at SAP, I led QA for a new feature by creating and executing release-ready test plans. I supported regression and feature testing, investigated network/API behavior, fixed bugs, and improved code coverage with JavaScript and TypeScript unit tests.
